name: Baroyeca Gold & Silver Inc.
summary: Baroyeca Gold & Silver Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties. It has an option to acquire 100% interests in the Santa Barbara property consisting of 110.86 hectares located in the Municipality of San Mart√É¬≠n de Loba, Bolivar Department, Colombia; and the Falan property comprising 2,859.21 hectares situated in the Municipality of Falan, Tolima Department, Colombia. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
